mapper.select: SELECT * FROM shared_game_records WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND expires_at > NOW() LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM shared_game_records WHERE record_id = #{recordId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM shared_game_records WHERE share_id = #{shareId} AND expires_at > NOW() LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE shared_game_records SET share_id = #{shareId}, account_id = #{accountId}, nick = #{nick}, profile_img_url = #{profileImgUrl}, target_word = #{targetWord}, start_doc = #{startDoc}, nav_path = #{navPath}, elapsed_ms = #{elapsedMs}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, created_at = NOW() WHERE record_id = #{recordId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM shared_game_records WHERE expires_at <= NOW()
